title: 2. Needle the third and fourth point of WuHu (11.27)
text:

Tung's Acupuncture

124 of 314
Here the foot pain mainly refers to the pain of the sole and dorsum of the foot. To treat such foot pain, we can
needle JiuLi on the opposite side. The point JiuLi corresponds to FengShi. It is also effective to needle the third
point of WuHu. In case of leg pain, needling JiuLi is effective. Besides, CiBai (A.06) is also effective.
